results.rendered_html:
pālanīya (wie eben) adj.
1〉 zu hüten, zu schützen, zu pflegen, zu bewahren  BṚHASPATI _in_ DĀYABH. 90,4 .  MBH. 3,36 . kumāraḥ pālanīyaste  R. 6,104,25 . dharmasetu Inschr. in  Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 7,28,16 .
— 2〉 aufrechtzuhalten, zu respectiren: dharmadāya (so ist doch wohl zu lesen)  ebend. 7 .

pālanīya a.
1 To be protected or guarded.
2 Fit to be protected, preserved or maintained.
3 To be kept or observed (as a promise, vow &c.)
